# SHIFT Festival
> De laatstejaarsexpo van Multimedia & Creatieve Technologie studenten.

SHIFT Festival is the graduating student expo of the Multimedia & Creative Technology programme. On Friday 19 June 2026, students present digital innovations, creative concepts and final projects centred around societal themes. The event also features a live show and an awards ceremony.

## Pages

- https://shiftfestival.be/: Main event page — date, concept, general info
- https://shiftfestival.be/project: Overview of all student projects
- https://shiftfestival.be/awards: Explanation of the awards; winners published after the event
- https://shiftfestival.be/info: Practical information about the event

## Excluded

The following paths contain no useful public content for LLMs:

- https://shiftfestival.be/login
- https://shiftfestival.be/project/*
- https://shiftfestival.be/privacy/*
- https://shiftfestival.be/404
- https://shiftfestival.be/u/*
